recalls.Description: Stanley Black & Decker has announced a recall of specific 2024 model year DeWALT Battery walk-behind mowers due to a potential laceration hazard. The affected models include the 21" Push mowers (DCMWP234U2 and DCMWP600X2) and the 21" Self-Propelled mowers (DCMWSP256U2 and DCMWSP650Y2). These mowers are identifiable by their black, gray, and yellow colors with 'DeWALT' printed prominently in yellow. The model number can be found on the rear door, while the date code is laser-printed on the left side above the rear wheel. Only mowers with date codes from 2023 32-58 to 2024 13-58 are involved in this recall; those manufactured after March 2024 are safe.
recalls.Title: DeWALT Battery Walk-Behind Mowers Recalled by Stanley Black & Decker Due to Laceration Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should contact DeWALT at 800-990-6421 between 8 a.m. and 6 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. Additional information can be found online at https://www.dewalt.com/push-mowers-recall or by visiting https://www.dewalt.com and clicking on 'Safety Notices and Recalls' at the bottom of the page.

Products.Name: DeWALT Battery Push Mower
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 46,200 (In addition, about 9,600 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled 2024 DeWALT Battery Push walk behind mowers, model no. DCMWP234U2

The model number is printed on the rear door of the mower
The date code is printed on the left side of the mower, above the rear wheel

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 10 reports of mowers failing to shut off when the bail handle is released and one report of a mower starting without a key inserted. The incident in which a mower started without a key inserted resulted in a finger laceration for which no medical attention was required.

Manufacturers.Name: Stanley Black and Decker Inc., of New Britain, Connecticut

Hazards.Name: Laceration hazard due to potential failure to shut off

Remedies.Name: Free repair at an authorized service center

recalls.metaDescription: DeWALT recalls specific battery walk-behind mowers due to laceration hazards. Check if your mower is affected and contact DeWALT for a free repair.
